title: Phase 4: Cache & Incremental Invalidation
description: Implement mtime-based cache layer with two-tier staleness detection (O(1) dir check, O(N) file scan), JIT invalidation on query, warm reindex for proactive refresh, and incremental reload of only changed files. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: Starting Phase 4 cache/invalidation work. Did: Phase 3 complete and pushed. Next: review cache features + specs, outline implementation plan and gaps. Blockers: none.
